description_long: This is a slice of layered cake with three distinct tiers, alternating between white and pink layers, giving it a visually appealing striped appearance. The top surface is smooth and white, adorned with two glossy, dark red cherries, one of which has a visible stem. The cake's sides reveal the even, horizontal layering of the sponge and filling, with the pink layers appearing slightly thicker than the white. The overall shape is a classic triangular wedge, with rounded edges and a slightly domed top. The cake appears soft and moist, with a creamy or whipped topping and a playful, minimalist decoration style.
description: A three-layered pink and white cake slice topped with two glossy cherries, featuring smooth, rounded edges and a soft, creamy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular face of the cake, both cherries visible on top, and clear horizontal pink and white layers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the layers and the rounded top, with both cherries visible from the side.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the placement of the cherries and the triangular shape of the cake slice.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the layered structure and the cherries from a different angle, with the cake's wedge shape prominent.
